title: AAA Schema Registry
description: Canonical index of all JSON schemas in the AAA control plane. Add new schemas here when they are forged so agents can discover them via /.well-known/schema-registry.json.

schemas.title: AREP Task — Arif Reality Engineering Protocol
schemas.description: Formal contract for human→agent task delegation. Replaces prompt engineering with reality engineering. Aligned with A2A v1.0.

schemas.title: AREP Reality Layers
schemas.description: Four-layer truth stack (GROUND_TRUTH → VERIFIED_STATE → CACHED_STATE → INFERRED) anchoring every AREP task. Aligned with AgenticReality (March 2026).

schemas.title: AAA A2A Agent Card
schemas.description: Agent identity and capability declaration per Google A2A v1.0 protocol.

schemas.title: AAA Federation Contract
schemas.description: Cross-organ federation topology, invariants, and trust tiers.

schemas.title: AAA Cockpit Model
schemas.description: Operator surface model — agents, sessions, workflows, approvals.

schemas.title: Epistemic Signal
schemas.description: Agent epistemic state — belief strength, confidence, evidence grounding.

schemas.title: AAA State Language
schemas.description: Canonical state record for every significant arifOS federation decision. Zen-derived: explicit beats implicit, errors become state, one governed path, namespaces preserve accountability.

schemas.title: Nusantara State Language
schemas.description: Cultural intelligence substrate for AAA state records, encoding Malay/Nusantara governance semantics: adat, maruah, sabar, amuk, silaturrahim, and fiqh obligation bands.

layer_legend.REALITY_ENGINEERING: What is true, what exists, what is allowed — the top discipline
layer_legend.CONSTITUTIONAL_ENGINEERING: What cannot be violated — floors F1-F13, VAULT999
layer_legend.AGENT_ENGINEERING: How to build autonomous systems — A2A, MCP, agent shells
layer_legend.INTENT_ENGINEERING: How to delegate to an agent — task contracts, success criteria
layer_legend.PROMPT_ENGINEERING: How to talk to a model — OBSOLETE, replaced by AREP
